_documentation.description: Elementos de búsqueda y filtros de la aplicación. Responsable de traducir el interface del buscador (input, botones) y la página de resultados.
_documentation.usage: Componentes DesktopSearch, MobileSearch, TabletSearch, página /search, página de resultados de búsqueda
_documentation.contains: Placeholders del input, etiquetas de botones (submit, open, close), mensajes de resultados, textos de ayuda y SEO
responsible_for: DesktopSearch, MobileSearch, TabletSearch: search.input.placeholder, search.button.submit, search.button.open, search.button.cancel
Search results page: hero.title_query, hero.title_empty, hero.summary_query, hero.summary_empty
_documentation.usage_pattern: t('search:{{key}}') para acceso anidado, ej: t('search:input.placeholder')

seo.desc_query_one: {{count}} result for "{{query}}" at Hipermercado Superior. Find the best products at the best price.
seo.desc_query_other: {{count}} results for "{{query}}" at Hipermercado Superior. Find the best products at the best price.
seo.desc_empty: Search and quickly find the products you need at Hipermercado Superior. Wide catalog with the best offers.
seo.keywords: product search, hypermarket, supermarket, offers, online shopping, superior catalog

hero.title_empty: Type something in the search bar
hero.summary_empty: Use the search bar in the header to view related products.

no_results.title: No products found
no_results.desc: Try another name or a more specific search.

start_search.title: Your search starts in the header
start_search.desc: Type the name of a product and press Enter to see the results here.
